title: Stress test — long labels, long summaries, no citations

nodes.label: Tokenization & Positional Encoding
nodes.summary: Splits raw text into subword units via byte-pair encoding, then injects positional information using sinusoidal encodings of dimension d_model so the model knows token order without recurrence.

nodes.label: Multi-Head Self Attention
nodes.summary: Eight parallel scaled dot-product attention heads project Q/K/V to dimension d_k each, attend to all positions, then concat and project back to d_model — captures long-range dependencies without recurrence.

nodes.label: FFN + Residual + LayerNorm
nodes.summary: Position-wise feed-forward network (two linear layers with ReLU) wrapped in a residual connection and layer normalization, applied identically to each token position.

nodes.label: Decoder
nodes.summary: Stack of six identical decoder layers, each with masked self-attention, encoder-decoder cross-attention, and FFN sub-layers — generates the output sequence autoregressively.

nodes.label: Output Projection
nodes.summary: Linear projection to vocabulary size followed by softmax — produces a probability distribution over the next token at each position.
